name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: Carmichael, CA's ACE Cash Express at Fair Oaks Blvd offers fast payday and title loans with extended evening hours.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express in Carmichael, CA is located at 7250 Fair Oaks Blvd, a standalone storefront in this Sacramento suburb. The location is open Monday through Thursday from 10 AM to 7 PM, Friday 9 AM to 7 PM, and Saturday 10 AM to 5 PM, with no Sunday hours.

At this Carmichael location, you can access payday loans, title loans, and other quick cash services. Call 916-487-6669 to discuss your loan options or visit in person to apply.

For Carmichael residents needing fast cash between paychecks, ACE Cash Express offers same-day funding when you bring a valid ID, proof of income, and a bank account. Visit this Fair Oaks Blvd location during business hours for a quick application process.
address: 7250 Fair Oaks Blvd f, Carmichael, CA 95608

company_info.headquarters: 7250 Fair Oaks Blvd f, Carmichael, CA 95608

pros: Offers both in-store and online lending options for flexible access
Multiple financial services beyond loans including check cashing, bill payments, and money transfers
Nationwide store network with physical locations for face-to-face service
Same-day or next-day funding capability for emergency cash needs
Dedicated customer service infrastructure with multiple contact channels
Tax services available at select locations
Business services offered in addition to consumer lending
cons: High-cost lending sector with fees and rates significantly above traditional banks (specific APR/fees not disclosed on site)
Service availability varies by state—some loan products explicitly unavailable in certain states
Website contains 404 errors and broken location pages, suggesting outdated or poorly maintained web infrastructure
No transparent disclosure of interest rates, fees, or loan terms on the provided website content
best_for: Consumers in urgent need of emergency cash ($100-$1K) with minimal credit requirements
Individuals without access to traditional banking or with poor credit histories
People needing check cashing, bill payment, or money transfer services in areas with limited banking options
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers facing immediate financial emergencies who lack access to traditional credit or banking services and can tolerate high-cost lending. The primary caveat is that as a high-cost lender, borrowers should carefully evaluate whether emergency cash loans are necessary and explore lower-cost alternatives (credit unions, employer advances, nonprofit credit counseling) before committing to ACE's services.
meta_description: Carmichael, CA: ACE Cash Express at 7250 Fair Oaks Blvd. Fast payday & title loans with extended hours.
